task_description: Implement Sprint 2 features: (1) Undo/Redo in Phase 4 Editor with custom undo stack, menu integration, toolbar buttons, and validation refresh; (2) Find & Replace across all translations with modal dialog, scope control, undo integration, inline editor convenience, and CLI equivalent.

verification.summary: 198 tests pass (50 new: 20 undo + 25 find-replace GUI + 5 CLI replace tests). All existing 148 tests continue to pass. No regressions.
